CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(MobilePhone), "", HYPERLINK("tel:" & MobilePhone, IF(LEFT(MobilePhone, 3) = "+55", IF(LEN(MobilePhone) = 14, "+55 (" & MID(MobilePhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(MobilePhone, 6, 5) & "-" & MID(MobilePhone, 11, 4), IF(LEN(MobilePhone) = 13, "+55 (" & MID(MobilePhone, 4, 2) & ") " & MID(MobilePhone, 6, 4) & "-" & MID(MobilePhone, 10, 4), MobilePhone)), MobilePhone)) & " " & HYPERLINK("https://wa.me/" & SUBSTITUTE(MobilePhone, "+", ""), IMAGE("/resource/WhatsAppIcon", "WhatsApp", 20, 20)))
CustomField.label: Celular (exibição)
